utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified per the format requirement: 'with costs' and appropriate description.
- health_coverage: Specifies provider, plan, details indicating physical and mental health coverage, and cost (€165/month). Fully specified with costs.
- property_coverage: Specifies provider, plan, details for home/contents (comprehensive protection, electronics limit), and cost (€60/month). Fully specified with costs.
- travel_coverage: Specifies provider, plan, details (annual multi-trip, medical limits, concierge, adventure sports), and cost (€50/month). Fully specified with costs.
- additional_services: Provides description, dates, and cost (€0). Meets 'any enhancement services with costs'.
- total_budget: Provides monthly and annual cost breakdown (€275 monthly, €3,300 annual). Fully specified. All 5 items are included and meet the detail and cost requirements.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items from the final coverage plan and match them exactly to the ground-truth items. The plan includes: Health: LifeFirst Standard Package (closest ground-truth match is LifeFirst Standard Plan under primary_health_coverage physical_health and mental_health; both have rating 9; the plan name 'Package' vs 'Plan' is assumed to refer to the same LifeFirst Standard Plan). Property: InsurePlus Standard Coverage maps exactly to property_protection > home_content > InsurePlus Standard Coverage with rating 9. Travel: LifeFirst Standard Plan maps exactly to mobility_coverage > travel_insurance > LifeFirst Standard Plan with rating 9.
